title: DNS Exfiltration Detection (Entropy Analysis)
description: Detects potential DNS tunneling and data exfiltration by identifying DNS queries with unusually long subdomain labels. Long, random-looking subdomains (>30 chars) are indicative of encoded data being exfiltrated via DNS queries. Uses field analysis combined with frequency thresholds.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' and 'Event ID' = 22 | eval domain_length = length('Query Name') | where domain_length > 50 | stats count as long_dns_queries, unique('Query Name') as unique_domains by 'Host Name' | sort -long_dns_queries | where long_dns_queries > 10
falsepositives: CDN domains with long hashed URLs
Legitimate SaaS services with long domain names
